arts.ttl: Man City starlet scores from kick-off in stunning hat-trick including inventive finish in huge win
arts.sum: Manchester City continued their good form in the Under-18 Premier League with a resounding win over Newcastle - featuring a brilliant hat-trick from Divine Mukasa.

arts.ttl: 'He's gone' – Liverpool told Mohamed Salah has made mind up after contract outburst
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has stirred the pot by publicly revealing that Liverpool are yet to offer him a new contract and the Egyptian will be free to speak to foreign clubs in January

arts.ttl: Steven Gerrard addresses Al-Ettifaq sacking as Liverpool icon makes statement after defeat
arts.sum: Steven Gerrard spoke after watching his Al-Ettifaq side lose 4-0 to Al-Ittihad on Saturday in yet another damaging defeat for the Liverpool legend in the Saudi Pro League

arts.ttl: Chris Sutton makes staggering Liverpool vs Man City prediction as pundits say same thing
arts.sum: The pundits have been delivering their score predictions for today's big Premier League game between Liverpool and Manchester City at Anfield

arts.ttl: Man City 'in four-way fight' to sign history-making 18-year-old La Liga defender
arts.sum: Manchester City are one of four Premier League clubs keeping an eye on the performances of Juma Bah, an 18-year-old centre-back currently on loan at Real Valladolid.

arts.ttl: Phil Foden makes 'nightmare' Liverpool admission as Man City 'challenge' accepted
arts.sum: Liverpool host bitter rivals Manchester City at Anfield in the Premier League on Sunday afternoon

arts.ttl: Man United handed fresh Liam Delap transfer headache as Man City buyback clause explained
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United transfer news and gossip includes an update on Liam Delap

arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah needs help at Liverpool after controversial contract claim - and this is why
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has claimed that he has not received an offer of a new contract at Liverpool but the Reds forward was well within his rights to speak out despite severe criticism

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Manchester City LIVE: Premier League team news, line-ups and more ahead of crunch clash
arts.sum: Guardiola’s side are without a win in six games, and the Reds could extend the gap over the champions to 11 points

arts.ttl: Liverpool FC vs Man City live early team news plus kick-off time and how to watch
arts.sum: Manchester City can cut the gap to Liverpool to five points with a win at Anfield in the Premier League - but it will be 11 points if they lose.
